title: CSS
text: CSS DSP widget property that specifies one or more CSS files that are required to style the DSP widget. CSS = CssUrl { , CssUrl } Example: "CSS=$LIBURL/css/syntaxerrors.css, $LIBURL/css/theme1.css" Value Description CssUrl URL of a CSS file required to style the widget. Multiple URLs can be specified, separated by commas, semicolons, or GOLD-semicolon. Description The CSS property of a widget is used by the webdefinitions statement to add CSS links to a DSP. The expression $LIBURL can be used inside a value of CSS to specify URLs relative to the location of the Uniface JavaScript library. The webdefinitions statement will replace it with the value of assignment setting $UNIFACE_RUNTIME_BASE_URL . The property can be set in the usys.ini for each DSP widget type, in the Uniface IDE (press More in the widget properties dialog), and using $properties before the webdefinitions statement is called. This typically occurs in the postActivate trigger. Setting the URL property using $fieldproperties has no effect. Applies To All DSP widgets Related Links $UNIFACE_RUNTIME_BASE_URL Specify the URL where the runtime JavaScript and CSS files for Uniface are located. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
